text_en: 1543 (XV). United Nations: financial reports and accounts for the year ended 31 December 1959 and reports of the Committee of Auditors

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale

items_fr: 1. Accepte les  rapports  financiers  et  les  comptes  de !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies,  pour  l'exercice ter› mine le  31  decembre  1959,  ainsi  que  les  attestations  du Comite  des  commissaires  aux  comptes 1 ;

2. S'associe aux observations  que le  Comite  consul› tatif  pour  les  questions  administratives  et  budgetaires a  formulees a ce  sujet  clans  son  troisieme  rapport a I' Assemblee  generale  ( quinzieme  session )2.
items_en: 1. Accepts the financial reports and accounts of the United Nations, for the financial year ended 31 December 1959, as well as the certificates of the Board of Auditors 1;
2. Endorses the observations of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions on this subject in its third report to the General Assembly (thirteenth session)2.
